CodeSnippetSummary: Regmap cache defaults for commonly-used registers; used to restore state after power loss/reset.
HardwareEffect: Defines software expected register state for cache sync; not necessarily silicon reset defaults.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Applied during regcache sync after power-on/reset

CodeSnippetSummary: Default for clock mux.
HardwareEffect: Initial clock routing baseline.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Applied during regcache sync; final clocking set later by sysclk/setup_pll

CodeSnippetSummary: PLL divider defaults (P/R/J/D).
HardwareEffect: Defines initial PLL ratio fields.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Effective only when PLL is selected and powered on

CodeSnippetSummary: DAC/ADC oversampling and divider defaults.
HardwareEffect: Sets divider chain baseline for Fs.

CodeSnippetSummary: Audio serial interface defaults.
HardwareEffect: Baseline I2S/DSP format and BCLK divider.
Notes: BCLK divider needed when codec is master.

CodeSnippetSummary: DAC setup/mute/volume defaults.
HardwareEffect: Defines initial mute and digital gains.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Mute before enabling analog drivers to avoid pops

CodeSnippetSummary: ADC setup and gains defaults.
HardwareEffect: Baseline ADC power/gains.

CodeSnippetSummary: Output driver and analog gain defaults.
BitFieldsOrMask: Driver power bits + analog gain fields
HardwareEffect: Baseline output gains and routing.
Notes: Driver status polled in DAPM event.

CodeSnippetSummary: Mic bias and PGA routing defaults.
HardwareBlockAffected: Mic bias + mic PGA input selection
HardwareEffect: Baseline mic bias off and PGA selection.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Enable MICBIAS only when using mic
Notes: Set to user-selected voltage during DAPM.

CodeSnippetSummary: Mark autonomously changing registers as volatile for regmap caching.
HardwareEffect: Prevents cache from masking live silicon state.

CodeSnippetSummary: Prevent writes to read-only/sticky-flag registers.
HardwareEffect: Avoid nonsensical writes.

CodeSnippetSummary: Define paged register windows; PAGECTL selects which 0..127 window you access.
HardwareEffect: Driver can address registers in a flat space; regmap auto-writes PAGECTL.
Preconditions/Sequencing: PAGECTL written implicitly before page accesses

CodeSnippetSummary: Regmap transport: 8-bit reg + 8-bit data; caching; volatile/writeable hooks; paged ranges.
HardwareEffect: Consistent register access + cache restore.
Notes: Maps to paged codec register file.

CodeSnippetSummary: Poll a status register until masked bits match expected state.
HardwareEffect: Waits for hardware power-up/down completion bits.

CodeSnippetSummary: DAPM event handler that selects which status bit to poll based on widget and waits for it.
HardwareEffect: Ensures rails/blocks reached requested state (POST_PMU/POST_PMD).
Preconditions/Sequencing: Called by DAPM after power transitions
Notes: HP driver uses long timeout (up to 7s) for depop ramp.

CodeSnippetSummary: Enable or disable microphone bias at user-selected voltage.
HardwareEffect: Sets bias voltage on POST_PMU; turns off before power-down.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Bias supply must be present; avoid pops by sequencing
Notes: Voltage set from device property ai31xx-micbias-vg.

CodeSnippetSummary: Defines audio power widgets and their controlling registers/bits.
BitFieldsOrMask: Widget power bits and IFACE2 bit2
HardwareBlockAffected: Audio datapath + output drivers + clock gating
HardwareEffect: DAPM uses these to turn blocks on/off and invoke wait/polling.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Must have clocks enabled for state changes
Notes: Activate I2S clocks keeps BCLK/WCLK running in powerdown.

CodeSnippetSummary: Static DAPM routes describing signal paths between widgets.
HardwareEffect: Controls which sources can feed outputs and capture.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Routes adjusted for clock master modes
Notes: Clock master adds extra always-connected routes.

CodeSnippetSummary: Register ALSA controls and DAPM widgets/routes.
HardwareEffect: Exposes register fields as mixer controls/widgets.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Must be done during codec probe
Notes: Not direct HW but drives reg writes when user changes controls.

CodeSnippetSummary: Compute and program PLL and clock dividers for target sample rate and bus frame.
HardwareEffect: Routes PLL as CODEC clock
Preconditions/Sequencing: sets PLL ratio and DAC/ADC dividers + BCLK divider.
Notes: Requires sysclk and p_div set; call from hw_params
column13: Warns if cannot produce exact BCLK.

CodeSnippetSummary: Select PLL as CODEC_CLKIN and DAC_CLK as BDIV clock input.
HardwareEffect: Binds internal PLL output to codec core clock and BCLK divider source.

CodeSnippetSummary: Program word length and update sysclk if using BCLK as PLL input
HardwareEffect: Audio serial port
Preconditions/Sequencing: Sets data word length so framing matches BCLK/WCLK.

CodeSnippetSummary: Mute/unmute DAC digital stream.
HardwareEffect: Forces DAC outputs muted to avoid pops.
Notes: Digital mute is separate from analog driver power.

CodeSnippetSummary: Add/remove always-on DAPM routes required when codec is clock master.
HardwareEffect: Ensures DAC_CLK path stays powered so clocks can be generated.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Call after set_dai_fmt changes provider role

CodeSnippetSummary: Configure bus master/slave
HardwareEffect: AIC31XX_IFACE1_MASTER_MASK;AIC31XX_IFACE1_DATATYPE_MASK;AIC31XX_DATA_OFFSET_MASK;AIC31XX_BCLKINV_MASK
Notes: Sets clock provider bits and serial format. DSP mode toggles BCLK polarity due to codec sampling edge.
column14: Calls clock_master_routes to adjust power graph.

CodeSnippetSummary: Select PLL input source (MCLK/BCLK/GPIO1)
RegisterSymbol: compute P divider to keep mclk/p <=20MHz
RegisterPageIfKnown: and validate supported mclk/p in table.
HardwareEffect: AIC31XX_PLL_CLKIN_MASK/SHIFT
Notes: Chooses which clock feeds PLL reference and sets driver state (sysclk
column14: Must be called before hw_params unless using BCLK PLL input

CodeSnippetSummary: On regulator disable: assert reset GPIO (if present) and mark regcache dirty.
HardwareEffect: Handles brown-out/power cut so cache will be restored later.
Notes: Important for hardware where rails are switched off.

CodeSnippetSummary: Reset codec either via reset GPIO or register write.
HardwareEffect: Returns codec to known baseline state.

CodeSnippetSummary: Enable clock tree blocks by setting PM bits in PLL/divider regs.
HardwareEffect: Turns on PLL and divider clock domains; delays 10ms after PLLPR enable for stabilization.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Call when entering PREPARE from STANDBY
Notes: ADC dividers enabled only if table entry non-zero.

CodeSnippetSummary: Disable clock tree blocks by clearing PM bits.
HardwareEffect: Stops BCLK divider
column13: Call when leaving PREPARE to STANDBY

CodeSnippetSummary: Enable regulators
HardwareEffect: (bulk regulators);AIC31XX_RESET;AIC31XX_HSDETECT
column14: Restores programmed register state after full power loss.
column15: Must enable supplies before I2C writes; reset then sync
column16: HSDETECT is volatile so needs explicit restore.

CodeSnippetSummary: Enter cache-only mode and disable regulators.
HardwareEffect: Stops hardware; retains desired state in cache only.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Used when bias goes to OFF

CodeSnippetSummary: Bias-level transition handler controlling power and clocks.
HardwareEffect: OFF->STANDBY powers supplies and syncs cache; STANDBY->PREPARE enables clocks; reverse disables clocks/supplies.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Must follow ALSA DAPM bias rules

CodeSnippetSummary: Enable or disable headset detection by writing HSDETECT.
HardwareEffect: Turns detection engine on/off; also used to read headset type later.
Preconditions/Sequencing: HSDETECT is volatile; restore after power_on

CodeSnippetSummary: Register regulator notifiers
HardwareEffect: Page 0
column13: Programs output common-mode voltage based on supplies/DT override.
column14: Should be done once after probe and before enabling outputs
column15: Incorrect OCMV can affect pop/noise or output headroom.

CodeSnippetSummary: Read interrupt flags and report headset/button events; warn on short-circuit and overflows.
HardwareEffect: Handles short-circuit detect
column13: IRQ configured in i2c_probe; requires INT routing
column14: HSDETECT doubles as config+status so is volatile.

CodeSnippetSummary: Determine OCMV setting based on DT override or AVDD/DVDD voltages.
HardwareEffect: Chooses appropriate output common-mode voltage for given supply rails.
Preconditions/Sequencing: Run before codec probe sets HPDRIVER bits
Notes: Uses regulator_get_voltage; warnings on invalid voltages.

CodeSnippetSummary: Load firmware coefficients and write processing block and filter coefficient bytes to pages 8 and 9.
HardwareEffect: N/A
Notes: Programs DAC processing block and FIR/IIR coefficients used by DAC3100 variant.
column13: Only for DAC3100; requires firmware blob size/magic/version
column14: Multi-byte interpretation is big-endian in firmware; writes are byte-wise.

CodeSnippetSummary: Create regmap
HardwareEffect: setup IRQ and optional firmware
column16: Routes INT1 to GPIO1 and enables interrupt sources (plug/button/SC/engine).
column18: After regmap init and supplies acquired.
